title: How to get a police certificate - Suriname - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Suriname
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Certificate of Good Conduct ( Bewijs van Goedgedrag )

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you live in Suriname
Apply at the local district commissioner’s office.
- two passport-size photographs
- a certificate from the Registrar’s Office ( Burgerlikje Stand )
Police certificates are also available from the police headquarters in Paramaribo.

### If you live outside Suriname
You may apply at a Surinamese embassy or consulate.
Police headquarters in Paramaribo
Telephone: 597-473-111 or 597-474-342
